steps.t: Gandalf is in the room that was given to him in the Dwelling-halls, east of the Jewelstead and up several sets of stairs.
Authi planned to meet you outside the entrance to the Lonely Mountain after you prepared for the journey and said good-bye to Gandalf.
Khîl Tale-spinner is at the entrance to the Lonely Mountain.
Authi Gem-cutter is at the entrance to the Lonely Mountain.
Authi has suggested you help the people of the Ironfold as you travel to Járnfast. <rgb=#00FF00>Complete any four of the objectives Authi has su…
The entrance to Járnfast is in the north-east corner of the Ironfold.
You have successfully escorted Khîl to Járnfast and should now speak to him.
Authi is at the entrance to Járnfast.
